# NiranX Universe

> Free all-in-one AI-powered study platform with smart timetable, flashcards, AI tutor, quiz generator, document scanner, live classroom, music streaming, and 100+ productivity tools for students.

NiranX Universe combines artificial intelligence, study planning, collaboration, and creative tools in a single web app. It serves students, teachers, and self-learners with adaptive scheduling, spaced repetition, real-time classrooms, and access to 500+ frontier AI models.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page and product overview.
- [About](/about): Mission and team behind NiranX Universe.
- [Developers](/about-developers): Information for developers and the API platform.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and pricing details.
- [Documentation](/docs): Guides and reference for all features.
- [What's New](/whats-new): Latest updates and changelog.
- [Sitemap](/sitemap): Full list of public pages.

## Features

- [Nexus Hub](/nexus): Central hub for all NiranX tools and categories.
- [AI Hub](/nexus/ai-hub): 500+ AI models for chat, reasoning, and creation.
- [Learn Zone](/nexus/learn-zone): Study tools, courses, and learning resources.
- [XVibe Music](/nexus/xvibe-music): Study-friendly music streaming.
- [Smart Timetable](/smart-timetable): Adaptive weekly study scheduler.
- [Flashcards](/flashcards): Spaced repetition decks with AI generation.
- [AI Quiz Generator](/ai-quiz-generator): Instant quizzes from any source.
- [Document Scanner](/document-scanner): OCR and AI summarization.
- [Pomodoro Timer](/pomodoro): Focus sessions with analytics.
- [Live Classroom](/live-classroom): Real-time video, screen share, breakout rooms.
- [Cornell Notes](/cornell-notes): Structured note-taking workflow.
- [Mind Maps](/mind-map-builder): Visual knowledge graphs.
- [Focus Engine](/focus-engine): Public focus session tool.

## Optional

- [Auth](/auth): Sign in or create an account.
- [Search](/seo-search): Universal search across the platform.
- [Sitemap XML](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable sitemap for crawlers.
